negative_prompt_default: text, letters, words, signs, logos, modern elements, artificial lighting, harsh shadows, digital artifacts, low quality
style_rules: Premium watercolor and gouache illustration style with soft, flowing brushstrokes
Warm twilight palette progressing from golden hour to deep blue starry night
Belgian countryside authenticity: Campine brick farmhouses, Walloon wheat fields, Ardennes rivers
Atmospheric perspective with misty backgrounds and firefly-lit foregrounds
Cinematic compositions with dynamic camera angles and emotional framing
Rich textural details: weathered stone, flowing water, wheat grain, soft fabric
Premium watercolor and gouache illustration style with soft, flowing brushstrokes
Warm twilight palette progressing from golden hour to deep blue starry night
Belgian countryside authenticity: Campine brick farmhouses, Walloon wheat fields, Ardennes rivers
Atmospheric perspective with misty backgrounds and firefly-lit foregrounds
Cinematic compositions with dynamic camera angles and emotional framing
Rich textural details: weathered stone, flowing water, wheat grain, soft fabric
visualBible.palette: Golden wheat, warm amber, soft violets, deep twilight blues, silver moonlight, firefly yellow-green, brick red, sage green willow
visualBible.lighting: Progressive lighting from golden hour through blue hour to moonlit night, with magical star glow and firefly sparkles
compositionRules: Dynamic character positioning with clear emotional gestures and eye contact
Environmental storytelling through detailed Belgian countryside settings
Atmospheric depth using foreground, midground, background layering
Magical elements integrated naturally into realistic settings

identityRules: Child around 5-6 years old with curious, expressive dark eyes
Tousled brown hair that catches the light naturally
Wearing comfortable countryside clothes: soft cardigan, sturdy shoes for walking
Small, agile build perfect for countryside adventures
Warm, open facial expression showing wonder and determination
heroBible.characterDesign: A 5-6 year old child with warm brown eyes full of curiosity, tousled brown hair, wearing a soft knitted cardigan over practical countryside clothes, with an expressive face that shows both wonder and gentle courage
forbiddenDrift: No age changes - must remain consistently 5-6 years old
No dramatic clothing changes - consistent countryside adventure outfit
No hair color or length changes
No facial feature changes - same expressive dark eyes and warm expression
No personality changes - always curious, gentle, and brave

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, letters, words, signs, logos, modern elements, artificial lighting, harsh shadows, digital artifacts, low quality

rules: All story scenes must include the child hero
Hero must be visually consistent across all pages
No text or readable elements in generated images

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with authentic Belgian setting, clear family themes, and age-appropriate magical realism. Excellent character development and cultural authenticity.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Highly visual scenes with clear composition guidelines, strong atmospheric progression, and distinctive Belgian countryside elements. Rich visual variety supports story progression.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed hero reference with comprehensive identity rules and forbidden drift specifications. Clear character design maintained across all story scenes.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: Complete translations in all three languages with culturally appropriate adaptations. Proper placeholder usage and gender neutrality maintained.

translationNaturalnessScore.rationale: Natural, idiomatic translations that read as native language rather than direct translations. Flemish Dutch particularly authentic for Belgian market.

pages.prompt_template: Cinematic wide shot of child and elderly grandfather with white hair and tweed jacket standing in Belgian countryside garden, pointing at brilliant shooting star in golden twilight sky, traditional Campine brick farmhouse background, watercolor gouache style
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, signs, modern buildings, urban elements, harsh lighting

pages.text_template: Voor {child_name}, die weet dat de mooiste reizen hand in hand worden gemaakt.

pages.prompt_template: Portrait of a 5-6 year old child with tousled brown hair, warm expressive dark eyes, wearing a soft knitted cardigan, gentle curious expression, watercolor illustration style
pages.negative_prompt: other people, background elements, text, letters, decorative items, story context

pages.text_template: In de tuin tijdens de gouden schemering toont Bompa Jules {child_name} een vallende ster. "Als we die volgen tot het einde, vervult ze een wens," fluistert {child_name}. {child_name} pakt bompa's hand vast, ogen vol sterrenglans.
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor illustration of child and elderly grandfather with white hair and gentle beard in cottage garden at golden twilight, both looking up at brilliant shooting star, grandfather pointing skyward, child's face filled with wonder, weathered vegetable garden, warm golden light
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, modern clothing, urban setting, harsh lighting, noon sun

pages.text_template: Het lichtspoor kruist een tarweveld badend in gouden licht. {child_name} en Bompa Jules wandelen tussen de fluisterende halmen. De grijze reiger kijkt naar hen vanaf een oude wilg, alsof {child_possessive_det} uitnodigt om te volgen.
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor landscape of child and elderly grandfather walking through golden wheat field dotted with red poppies, grey heron perched majestically in old willow tree watching them, rolling Belgian countryside, warm golden hour lighting, gouache texture
pages.negative_prompt: modern elements, machinery, power lines, text, signs, harsh shadows

pages.text_template: Aan de rivieroever leidt de reiger hen naar een oude stenen brug. De hemel kleurt paars en de eerste vuurvliegjes verschijnen. {child_name} ziet het spoor van de ster weerkaatsen op het stille water.
pages.prompt_template: Atmospheric watercolor of weathered stone bridge over calm river at blue hour, child and grandfather approaching bridge, majestic grey heron by water's edge, violet twilight sky, shooting star trail reflected in still water, first fireflies beginning to glow
pages.negative_prompt: modern bridges, vehicles, street lights, concrete, text, bright artificial lighting

pages.text_template: In het donker wordende bos tekenen vuurvliegjes een magisch pad. {child_name} voelt zich een beetje bang voor het donker. "Moed betekent verder gaan, ook al ben je bang," zegt Bompa Jules zachtjes.
pages.prompt_template: Enchanting forest scene with child walking close to protective grandfather through dark woods, magical fireflies creating glowing light trails, patient grey heron perched on low branch, dappled moonlight, watercolor with luminous firefly effects
pages.negative_prompt: frightening elements, predators, artificial lighting, text, modern objects

pages.text_template: In een maanbeschenen open plek rust de vallende ster zachtjes in het gras, kloppend met warm licht. {child_name} sluit {child_possessive_det} ogen en doet een wens: "Laat bompa's tuin weer bloeien."
pages.prompt_template: Magical watercolor of moonlit forest clearing with child kneeling beside softly glowing shooting star resting in grass, eyes closed making heartfelt wish, grandfather watching with tender pride, brilliant moonlight and starry sky, warm golden star glow
pages.negative_prompt: artificial objects, text, harsh contrasts, frightening elements, modern items

pages.text_template: De volgende ochtend barst Bompa Jules' tuin over van kleurrijke bloemen en leven. Bompa Jules kijkt naar {child_name} met ogen die helderder stralen dan sterren. Het echte geschenk was de reis samen.
pages.prompt_template: Joyful morning watercolor of transformed cottage garden bursting with colorful flowers and thriving vegetables, child and grandfather embracing in wonder, grey heron gracefully taking flight, warm morning sunlight, celebration of renewal and love
pages.negative_prompt: dead plants, artificial elements, text, harsh lighting, urban elements

pages.text_template: Een magisch avontuur waarin {child_name} ontdekt dat vrijgevige wensen de mooiste mirakels kunnen scheppen.
Wanneer {child_name} een vallende ster volgt door het Belgische platteland met Bompa Jules, ontdekt {child_pronoun_subject} dat de mooiste wensen degene zijn die we voor anderen doen.
pages.prompt_template: Peaceful watercolor vista of Belgian countryside with rolling fields, traditional farmhouse, and gentle path winding through landscape, soft twilight sky with hint of starlight, serene and inviting atmosphere
pages.negative_prompt: dramatic action, text, modern elements, harsh lighting, urban development
